Content Title: Nano Tips for Influencing Those More Senior Than You with Shadé Zahrai
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this course, award-winning leadership strategist and peak performance educator for Fortune 500 companies, Shadé Zahrai, highlights effective ways to influence up. Increase your powers of persuasion by learning steps to prepare and align your goals with the goals of the leader you need to influence, proactive strategies for gaining buy-in, how to navigate disagreements, and how to manage the dynamics of your conversation.

Content Title: Excel: Introduction to Charts and Graphs
Content Description: Learn the basics of Excel charts and graphs in this concise course. Excel expert Dennis Taylor begins by explaining Excel chart concepts, including identifying the different elements of a chart and choosing the right chart type. Next, Dennis walks through creating a basic chart, using the Recommended Charts feature and keyboard shortcuts to get the job done quickly. Dennis then covers formatting charts with styles, colors, and more. Finally, he steps through the most popular chart options: column, bar, and line charts. Note that this course is recorded in Excel for Microsoft 365 but anyone using a recent version—including Office 365, 2019, 2016, and 2013—will be able to follow along.

Content Title: Leveraging AI for Governance, Risk, and Compliance
Content Description: AI is one of the biggest topics in cybersecurity right now, and unsurprisingly, that includes the area of governance, risk, and compliance. In this course, cybersecurity manager Terra Cooke explores risk management, legal considerations, and other ways AI can integrate into a GRC environment. Terra covers different aspects of GRC work that could benefit from AI–while keeping in mind that it is not a fix-all solution for all problems. She analyzes roles, responsibilities, and the pros and cons to consider before moving forward with AI solutions. Plus, hear about the factors you should look into before agreeing to the terms and conditions of an AI program.

Content Title: Enhancing Images with Artificial Intelligence (AI)
Content Description:
The use of artificial intelligence is fundamentally changing the way that photos are edited and enhanced. New creative options are unlocked and previously impossible tasks are made easy. Don’t wait to harness the power of artificial intelligence. Join instructor Rich Harrington as he explores a variety of AI-powered apps that can take your photography to the next level. Learn how to get better results from raw files, find images with intelligent search tools, and use software from Adobe, Skylum, EyeQ, and Topaz Labs to perform common and uncommon editing tasks, from fixing color and tone to automatically enhancing portraits to adding color and detail that doesn’t exist in the original photograph. By the end of the course, you’ll be amazed and empowered by what you can do with AI.

This course was created by RHED Pixel. We are pleased to offer this training in our library.

Content Title: Excel Supply Chain Analysis: Solving Transportation Problems
Content Description:
Microsoft Excel can be a secret advantage when it comes to solving complex supply chain challenges. Follow along with instructor Curt Frye as he shows how to use the Excel Solver add-in to minimize transportation and transshipment costs within a supply chain. Curt covers a range of topics, including how to analyze fixed costs and facility opening decisions, enforce level of service constraints, and perform scenario analysis. He also provides problem scenarios for you to solve, then goes through the solutions for each. After watching this course and working through the examples, you'll be able to describe the techniques specialized supply chain programs use to arrive at their results.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from CSCMP.

Content Title: Transforming Business with AI Agents: Autonomous Efficiency and Decision-Making
Content Description: Unlock the power of AI agents to revolutionize your business. In this course, best-selling author and thought leader Charlene Li delves into the ever-evolving landscape of AI, providing a clear, comprehensive introduction to autonomous, adaptive AI agents. You’ll learn how to define and identify AI agents and how they differ from other AI products. Charlene outlines AI agents’ potential to boost productivity and enhance decision-making, as well as how agents can automate complex workflows. Along the way, explore the critical challenges of trust, privacy, common ethical concerns, and key considerations for evaluating the use of AI agents in your organization.

Content Title: Generative AI UX Design with Uizard
Content Description: In this course, seasoned product leader Drew Falkman highlights the power of Uizard AI features in creating user interfaces swiftly and efficiently. Uncover the ability to generate complete designs from AI prompts, simple wireframes, sketches, or screenshots. Learn how to make your prototypes interactive, apply cohesive design themes across projects, and export your work for further development. Key topics include automating design tasks, creating reusable components, and using AI to enhance creativity. Learn how to leverage AI tools to streamline the design and prototyping process, giving you more time to focus on innovation. This course covers both foundational and advanced techniques, making it suitable for beginners and experienced professionals alike. Gain a competitive edge by mastering AI-enhanced design, ensuring your projects are both efficient and aesthetically engaging.

Content Title: Adobe Firefly Essential Training (2024)
Content Description:
Generative AI is taking the world by storm, and Adobe has offered their own answer to the artificial intelligence revolution—Adobe Firefly. This family of generative AI models equips you with the potential to revolutionize your design skills and elevate your creative projects to unprecedented heights. In this course, join lifelong designer Bart Van de Wiele as he teaches you how to use Adobe Firefly to upgrade how you work as a designer, marketer, photographer, brand manager, or video producer.

Gain an understanding of how Firefly fits into the greater Creative Cloud ecosystem. Learn how to write effective Firefly text prompts for generating high-quality images and vector art; create and recolor your artwork using Firefly and Illustrator; use Generative Fill in Photoshop to replace portions of an image with just a few mouse clicks and a text prompt; and work with text effects and templates with Firefly and Adobe Express. Bart also explains why content credentials matter in a world of AI-generated images.

Content Title: Using AI in the UX Design Process
Content Description:
If you’re a UX designer or researcher, you’re probably already wondering about the best way to adapt to the new wave of AI-powered tools and workflows. In this course, UX expert Tetiana Gulei shows you how to take a basic design and apply AI to it to streamline the design process and improve your outcomes along the way.

Learn how to use generative AI to assist in product discovery and ideation, such as analyzing user data, creating personas, storyboarding, idea generation, and more. Find out how AI can extend the visual design process when it comes to creating mood boards, generating images, and working with colors, fonts, and styles. By the end of this course, you’ll be prepared to start using cutting-edge generative AI tools to streamline your design process, from initial user research to product creation, while also contributing to long-term design strategy validation.

Content Title: Critical Roles Consultants Play (and the Skills You Need to Fill Them)
Content Description: New consultants are often surprised by how agile they need to be to fulfill client expectations. The role you play may vary from contract to contract, or even shift within the same engagement. This course helps prepare you for the many different roles a consultant must play and succeed in the challenging world of consulting. Bob McGannon explains how your role differs from your job and how you can assess the needs of your client right at the start of the engagement. He then reviews the seven major roles—technical expert, manager, team leader, follower, reviewer, critic, and implementer—explaining when each role is most useful to your client. Live-action scenarios help you see the roles in action and apply what you have learned. In the final chapter, Bob discusses how to close the engagement, emphasizing the value your role has provided in order to position yourself for the next one.

Content Title: Nano Tips to Uncover Your Strengths with Shadé Zahrai
Content Description:
Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this installment, explore the power of uncovering your inner strengths and managing your weaknesses to promote personal growth.

Join peak performance researcher and behavioral strategist Shadé Zahrai to learn the secrets of identifying and evolving your strengths with a genuinely curious, growth-focused mindset. Unearth your best possible self and start building on the innate qualities of your character, gathering feedback, unlocking your full potential, seeking balance, and finding your flow state. Along the way, Shadé shows you how to scrutinize your weaknesses to weed out bad habits, play to your strengths, and invest in your future self.

Content Title: Excel: Supply Chain Shipping Analysis
Content Description: Microsoft Excel is one of the world’s most widely used spreadsheet applications, and for good reason. It’s an essential everyday tool if you work in logistics and shipping, or are interested in landing a role in the field. In this course, instructor Curt Frye covers advanced Excel skills for performing supply chain shipping analysis, including shipping modes and costs, logistics and transportation networks, distribution, inventory management, route creation and evaluation with the Solver model, and more. By the end of this course, you’ll be prepared to evaluate complex shipping scenarios to make informed data-driven business decisions.

Content Title: Building a Superstar Brand
Content Description:
Ever wondered what it takes to create your own brand and become a superstar along the way? Explore the value of storytelling, vision, and commitment in this course with World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE) chief brand officer Stephanie McMahon, as she shows you how to lead by example and leave a legacy in your wake. Learn key lessons from Stephanie’s hard-earned experiences and colorful tales of growing up in an entrepreneurial culture. The course shares valuable lessons on how to scale superstar partnerships, create a rich DEI culture, and build powerful fan relationships. Discover proven leadership strategies and tips that you can apply to your own venture or job. Throughout the course, Stephanie looks back on the sacrifices her parents made back when they were first promoting the WWE, growing it from nothing to superpower status, and inspiring millions around the world.

Note: This course was created by genconnectU. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Photoshop 2023 Essential Training
Content Description:
Whether you’re an experienced creative professional or just looking to make the most out of your new camera, learning how to use Photoshop 2023 efficiently and effectively is the best investment you can make to get the most out of your pixels. Photoshop is a deep, complex, and at times, intimidating product. In this course, instructor Julieanne Kost filters out the noise and complexity to help you quickly achieve the results you want.

Julieanne covers the fundamentals of digital imaging—from working with multiple images to customizing the Photoshop interface. She explains how to choose the right tools to crop, tone, and retouch photos, while always maintaining the highest-quality output. She also demonstrates the most efficient ways to perform common tasks, including working with layers, selections, and masking. Along the way, learn the secrets of nondestructive editing using Smart Objects, how to create animated GIFs, and much more.

Content Title: Storytelling and Content Creation to Transform Your Personal Brand
Content Description: Storytelling gives you the power to create an engaging brand, but how can you start using it more effectively for your content? In this course, instructor Ash Rathod demonstrates how to master the art of storytelling to deliver more engaging content for your business and personal brand. Find out why storytelling matters for creators in all digital mediums, regardless of your specific messaging, channel, audience, or field, as you unlock the secrets of evocative storytelling using the key components of his 6P storytelling framework. Along the way, Ash shows you how to conduct the right research to build a winning strategy, write compelling and inspiring content, and enhance your visibility across a wide variety of platforms.

Content Title: Understanding the Cash Conversion Cycle for Business
Content Description:
The cash conversion cycle isn’t just another accounting metric, it’s a crystal ball into a company’s financial health and risk profile. A successful business professional who understands the cash conversion cycle will make better decisions, mitigate risk, and provide strategic recommendations to their organization.

In this course, Hailey Margetta provides an overview of how to calculate the cash conversion cycle, interpret its meaning, identify risks that can impact a businesses cash conversion cycle and shares the best questions to ask when completing your analysis.

Because a company’s cash conversion cycle impacts everything from meeting its financial obligations to future growth, it’s a concept all driven business professionals need to understand.

Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in seconds. In this installment, Lisa Bodell offers frameworks and techniques for tackling challenges, developing products, growing creatively, and brainstorming.

Content Title: Seven Paths to Happiness (and Two Dead Ends): Strategies for Your Life and Career
Content Description:
Choosing the right path for your career and life can be one of the most impactful decisions you make. In this course, Chris Croft explores the seven distinct paths to happiness, each with its own set of advantages and challenges. Whether aiming for corporate success, launching a business, or pursuing a passion, this course provides valuable insights into how different paths align with individual personalities, skills, and aspirations. Chris looks in-depth at topics such as the trade-offs of financial-driven goals, the pursuit of a vocation, and how to find balance in multi-harvesting or niche careers.

This course was created by Chris Croft and CRFT Productions. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Hidden Genius: How Successful People Think (Book Bite)
Content Description:
When we hear the word genius, we often think of some kind of extraordinary—perhaps even magical—human being. But what if genius isn’t an inherent quality but just a way of looking at the world—a way that you could learn to employ? In this audiobook summary, Polina Marinova Pompliano shares five key insights from her new book, Hidden Genius: The secret ways of thinking that power the world’s most successful people. Join Polina as she helps you unlock the genius within. Learn how manufacturing hardship leads to lasting mental toughness; how love is a skill that needs to be sharpened regularly; how to audit the information you put in your brain; the importance of tying your identity to your own name; and how your definition of success is personal and ever-changing.

Note: This audiobook summary was created by Next Big Idea Club. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Nano Tips to Build Authority on LinkedIn with Shadé Zahrai & Jasmin Alić
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. Develop skills to format posts effectively, engage with comments, and subtly showcase their expertise without sounding overly promotional. Through storytelling, video strategies, and permission-based selling, learn how to enhance your LinkedIn presence and create content that resonates with your audience.

Content Title: Practical GitHub Actions
Content Description:
For developer professionals, solving problems is a vital part of the job—particularly solving problems that keep coming up. GitHub Actions will let you automate your repetitive problems away, and in this course—created in partnership with GitHub—Ray Villalobos shows you how to set them up to tackle real-world projects. Ray starts with the basics of Actions, going over what you can do with them and how they work. He then shows you the steps necessary to publish a marketplace action, including creating a workflow, a generator repo Dockerfile, entry point, and action.yml file. Finally, Ray takes you through testing and releasing your GitHub Action.

If you’re a developer looking to advance your career, or a recent computer science grad searching for a developer role, check out this course to learn practical skills to add your portfolio and enhance your standing in a competitive job market.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from GitHub.

Content Title: Supply Chain Beyond the Basics: Leveraging Supply Chain Information Systems
Content Description: In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, Supply Chain Information Systems (SCIS) play a critical role in optimizing logistics, procurement, inventory management, and overall supply chain performance. This course provides a comprehensive overview of essential SCIS categories, including WMS, ERP, TMS, OMS, and AI-powered analytics, helping you understand how these systems work individually and integrate for seamless supply chain operations. Explore data management strategies, system interoperability (EDI/API), and cybersecurity considerations to ensure secure and efficient supply chain management. Through realistic examples and best practices, gain the knowledge needed to leverage SCIS effectively, improve operational resilience, and drive digital transformation in supply chains.

Content Title: Tips for Fostering a Growth Mindset from Today’s Top Business Leaders
Content Description: In this course, high-profile business leaders share short, actionable advice for anyone trying to cultivate a growth mindset. Hear about how to own your failures from media mogul Jeffrey Katzenberg. Find out how to change a scarcity mindset from Nopalera founder Sandra Velasquez. Learn to be open to experimentation with lessons from Liquid Death CEO Mike Cessario. Check out this course for these lessons and more to find out how you can develop a growth mindset.

Content Title: How to Build a Strong Professional Brand on LinkedIn with LinkedIn Career Expert Andrew Seaman
Content Description:
Your LinkedIn presence is more than just a profile—it’s your ticket to new opportunities. But how do you craft a standout professional brand that reflects your authentic self and attracts the right connections?

Join LinkedIn Editor at Large Andrew Seaman as he shares actionable insights designed to help you define your professional brand, optimize your profile, create content that opens doors, and transform your LinkedIn profile into a powerful tool for career advancement.

Whether you’re looking for a new role, building a following in your current one, or rebranding yourself for a professional pivot, Andrew demonstrates the importance of authenticity, consistency, visibility, and engagement as you grow your career.

This is a recording of a live event and features audience participation and an unscripted Q&A. Visit linkedin.com/events for more can’t-miss conversations featuring prominent leaders.

Content Title: Leveraging the Power of Social Intelligence in the Age of AI
Content Description:

Join technology journalist and analyst Chris Shipley as she explores the foundational elements of building your social intelligence, including developing sharp situational awareness and learning to regulate your response to both internal triggers and external environments. Discover uniquely human skills that are increasingly valuable in the age of AI, such as active listening, bias awareness, mindfulness, empathy, and fostering kindness. By the end of this course, you’ll have your own personalized social intelligence development plan, which can enable you to activate and apply your skills more intentionally in any situation. Whether you’re an aspiring leader or collaborator, or just looking to build more connections, this course offers the insights and tools you need to achieve your goals.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Microsoft.

Content Title: Drone Analysis with Drone2Map and ArcGIS Online
Content Description: In this course, cartography expert Dr. Jason VanHorn dives into the transformative world of drone imagery and geotechnologies. Learn how to process drone data into stunning 2D and 3D visuals using ArcGIS Drone2Map and ArcGIS Online, focusing on orthophoto creation and high-resolution GPS-grounded models. Discover how to use ground control points, manage drone projects, and understand the software interface to optimize your project workflows. Explore ways to convert raw drone data into polished products like true ortho-mosaics, raster surface models, and realistic 3D meshes. Enhance your skills with hands-on exercises and challenges that make your learning journey exciting and fruitful. With drone technology advancing rapidly, this course ensures you're equipped with cutting-edge skills to elevate your professional portfolio.

Content Title: Introduction to ESG: Environmental, Social, and Governance
Content Description: In this course, instructor Fulya Kocak Gin explains what the environmental, social, and governance (ESG) umbrella encompasses, why there is an increasing momentum around ESG, why corporations are expected to address their impact in environmental and social aspects of their businesses, and how governance plays into these efforts. Fulya covers foundational concepts under each one of the E, S, and G areas. She connects the dots between traditional social responsibility and sustainability projects and business performance, sustainable investing, and risk management.

Content Title: Excel: PivotTables for Beginners
Content Description: PivotTables don't have to be scary! This powerful Excel feature cuts the time you spend on formulas in half. In this concise course, Excel trainer Dave Ludwig demystifies PivotTables and shows you how to get started using them to analyze your data. Dave begins by explaining two PivotTable basic building blocks: value fields and row fields. Then he shows you how to adjust a PivotTable by adding fields, filters, and formatting. Dave shows you how to use special filter buttons which are known as slicers, and he also demonstrates how to use timelines. Plus, he goes over the basics of refreshing and updating a PivotTable. Finally, he’ll show you how to use AI in Excel to generate PivotTables automatically for you.

Content Title: Market Sizing: TAM/SAM/SOM
Content Description: How big is your market—and how much of it can you realistically capture? This audio-only course provides a comprehensive introduction to market sizing. Join market research expert Sarah Weise as she guides you through calculating your total addressable market (TAM), serviceable available market (SAM), and serviceable obtainable market (SOM). Through real-world case studies and practical applications, learn the skills needed to size your market accurately, prioritize audience segments with RICE scoring, and make data-driven strategic decisions for your business.

Content Title: Overcoming Fears: Preparing for Sales Calls
Content Description:
Even salespeople with years of experience may dread the task of making sales calls. Picking up the phone and convincing someone to buy your product, meet you, or even just speak to you, can be a daunting task. However, sales are a fantastic way to find new business opportunities and build professional relationships.

In this course, prospecting coach and sales expert Miles Croft teaches you that the secret to removing the fear of sales calls is to have a concise and thoroughly tested plan that you can rely on. The plan needs to be flexible and needs to ensure you remain human and approachable. Most of all, the plan must make sure you achieve your ultimate goal. Miles explains the common sales call factors that people fear most and gives practical advice on how to remove those fears. He also provides actionable tips on how to plan and execute the perfect sales call, leaving you with a clear, concise plan.

This course was created by Miles Croft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Adobe Firefly Essential Training
Content Description: In this course, Bart Van de Wiele—expert designer and author—guides you through the innovative Adobe Firefly AI technology and its seamless integration within Adobe Creative Cloud. Discover how to generate images and videos from text prompts, expanding your creative possibilities effortlessly. Master using Firefly to create vector graphics and patterns in Adobe Illustrator, while leveraging advanced features like generative fill and scene-to-image to enhance your designs. Explore enterprise solutions with Firefly Custom Models, Object Composites, and Style Kits to scale your creative production. Learn how to harness the power of AI for your projects with targeted examples and step-by-step guidance. Whether you are a designer, marketer, or creative professional, this course will elevate your workflows and artistic outcomes.

Content Title: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Essential Training
Content Description:
The California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) is the first major privacy act to come out of the United States. In this course, instructor Mandy Huth explains what the CCPA is and how it is similar and different from the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Mandy goes through the scope of the act, consumer rights, enforcement via the California Privacy Protection Agency (CPPA), and penalties. This course also covers the newest amendment to the regulation, called the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA), as well as the new “cookie law” that is required for websites.

DISCLAIMER: Neither LinkedIn nor the instructor represents you, and they are not giving legal advice. The information conveyed through this course is not intended to give legal advice, but instead to communicate information to help viewers understand the basics of the topic presented. Certain concepts may not apply in all countries. The views (and legal interpretations) presented in this course do not necessarily represent the views of LinkedIn.

Content Title: Finance Foundations
Content Description: Finance exists in the real world. It impacts everyone: individuals, families, companies, and governments. While it may sound complicated, at its core finance is about deciding what to buy, getting the money you need to buy it, and efficiently managing the resources you already own. In this course, Brigham Young University business professors Jim and Kay Stice provide a comprehensive overview of finance, touching on everything from reading a balance sheet to understanding derivatives and securities. They tackle questions such as "What is the difference between short-term financial management and long-term financing?" and "What is the difference between a traditional bank, an investment bank, and an investment fund?" Along the way, you can get an inside look at financial reports from companies such as Walmart, the operating cycle of Nike, the IPOs of Microsoft and Facebook, and even the data that go into personal financial decisions, such as deciding whether to buy a car.

Content Title: Pitching Yourself for Opportunity
Content Description: Every conversation presents an opportunity to make a great impression. In this course, Jodi Glickman, CEO and Founder of GreatOnTheJob.com, guides you through how to craft a compelling pitch with thought and intention so you can be persuasive, memorable, and able to reach your goals. Jodi shares the fundamental framework of leading with your destination, crafting your backstory, and then connecting the dots. She covers pitch basics (it’s a dialogue, not a monologue!), cautions against mistakes to avoid, and shares why no two pitches are ever the same. Plus, Jodi offers behind-the-scenes coaching on real-life examples of how to try out, practice, and improve your pitch.

Content Title: Career Essentials in GitHub Professional Certificate
Content Description: Want to advance your developer journey? Are you a new computer science grad looking for a developer role? These courses teach the skills to enrich your GitHub portfolio and elevate your profile in today's competitive job market. Tune in, pass the final exam, and earn your professional certificate.
